title: Payhip Alternatives for Restricted Countries: An Honest Side-by-Side Breakdown: What You Need to Know
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: You're a digital creator in Nigeria, Ghana, or Pakistan, and you've been blocked by PayPal, unable to sell your ebooks, courses, and digital art. You've tried alternatives like Gumroad and Payhip, only to be disappointed by their restrictions. It's time to explore a permanent structural alternative that bypasses these limitations, and that's where Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle comes in, offering a comprehensive solution for creators in restricted countries.
What Each Option Actually Offers

PayPal and Stripe are the giants of online payments, but they come with a catch: restrictive country lists and strict Know-Your-Customer (KYC) requirements that hinder digital creators in many parts of the world. Gumroad and Payhip, popular alternatives, have their own set of limitations, including transaction fees and manual delivery processes that can delay sales. In contrast, the Full Stack Bundle provides a comprehensive infrastructure for digital product sales, encompassing the Core Shop Engine, Web3 Wallet Connect, and Admin Dashboard, all in one seamless package.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

While PayPal and Stripe blacklist countries with questionable compliance or high-risk transactions, the Full Stack Bundle takes a different approach. Powered by NOWPayments, a payment processor that supports over 300 cryptocurrencies, this solution allows creators to sell their digital products without the need for KYC or any country restrictions. This means that creators in Nigeria, Ghana, Pakistan, and other restricted countries can finally unlock their full earning potential without the restrictions imposed by traditional payment platforms.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

Traditional payment platforms charge exorbitant fees, often taking a significant chunk of the creator's earnings. In contrast, the Full Stack Bundle charges a one-time payment of $79.99 for the Full Stack Bundle, which includes priority updates, Discord support, and a deployment guide. This upfront cost is a small price to pay for the freedom to sell digital products without the constant worry of transaction fees or delayed payments.
Don't let PayPal and Stripe's restrictions hold you back from selling your digital products.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

The risk of platform dependency is asymmetric in a specific way that most creators underestimate. When PayPal or Stripe is working, everything seems fine. When it stops working — through suspension, policy change, or geographic restriction enforcement — you lose access to your revenue channel instantly, often with funds already inside the platform that you cannot withdraw. Rebuilding on a new platform takes weeks. The income gap during that period is real money lost. Crypto-native infrastructure removes this asymmetric risk. Your wallet cannot be suspended. Your GitHub Pages store cannot be taken down by a payment platform's compliance team. The infrastructure is under your control from day one, which means no single external decision can cut off your income.
Which One to Choose Based on Your Situation

If you're a digital creator in a restricted country, looking for a way to bypass PayPal and Stripe's limitations, the Full Stack Bundle is the clear choice. With its comprehensive infrastructure, automated delivery, and no-KYC payment processor, this solution provides a permanent structural alternative that unlocks your full earning potential. So why wait? Get started with the Full Stack Bundle today and join the ranks of successful digital creators who have broken free from traditional payment restrictions.
How do I sell digital products if PayPal is not available in my country?

The direct answer is NOWPayments combined with the Core Shop Engine. NOWPayments is a crypto payment processor that requires no KYC from merchants and no account creation from buyers. It supports over 300 coins and sends a webhook to your backend when a payment confirms on-chain. The Core Shop Engine receives that webhook, verifies the transaction, generates a receipt, and delivers the product automatically. The key difference between this and a platform workaround is that it is not a workaround — it is a different infrastructure layer entirely. There is no platform that can suspend your access, no compliance team that can flag your account, and no payout schedule that delays your revenue. Your funds go directly to a wallet you control the moment a transaction confirms.
The Full Stack Bundle is the only comprehensive infrastructure that bypasses traditional payment platforms' limitations.
